metadata.description: DesignAgent — build production UI from Figma DESIGN.md specs with Claude Code.

plugins.name: designagent
plugins.description: Build production UI from a DesignAgent DESIGN.md spec the design-system-faithful way, plus a live two-way bridge to read, fix, and create on the Figma canvas from Claude Code. Includes the design-to-code skill and the designagent MCP server.
